content:
to unlock Ramona, one of the starting awakeners and your biggest companion in the game, to +12, you need to be Keeper lv 80, that is an incredibly high requirement, especially for a f2p.
I have 402 active days, more than a year, always playing some, and i'm only lv 70.
Now that we can take 3 copy per month of most welfare units, being able to get one to that level in only 4 moths, and considering that they now have the +12 special buff, I implore to lower the requirement to get her to +12 too.

That, or way more ways of getting account XP. 
P Dive and Traphaze has it but it's barely anything. Possibly when HSRailway gets fleshed out it can have XP reward there too.
Would be a great time to expand the Lightless challenges and add more xp rewards there. 

It's understandable that it's a long term thing. But even I am like LV 69 with nearly 240 days in. (With already a 10% bonus xp boost)
I'm roughly generating about 1200 (not calculating the bonus from paying) xp a day from just doing the missions and dumping stamina.
The best way to get account xp is the xp boost from huh <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>
The spending VIP, yes. But I don't think everyone is spending for the bonus alone. Mostly for the packs they want.
